revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

revision.comment: Bot: concatenate old target wikitext
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)" to "== "
Merge [[Category:沖縄県の建築物 ( by Municipality)]] into [[Category:Buildings in Okinawa Prefecture by Municipality]] via bot
Text replacement - "#REDIRECT [[:Category:" to "[[sn:Category:"
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[沖縄県]][[与那国町]]の建築物に関するカテゴリ。
{{デフォルトソート:よなくにちよう}} {{座標一覧}} [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]
==Local Content== {{citation needed|よなくにちよう}} {{座標一覧}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:与那国町の建築物]]}} {{translated page|ja|Category:与那国町の建築物|version=92643829}} {{translated page|ja|与那国町の建築物|2=Category:与那国町の建築物|comment=minor fix to get the category to display, cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} [[Category:Buildings in Okinawa Prefecture by Municipality]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Yonaguni, Okinawa]] [[ja:Category:与那国町の建築物]] [[sn:Category:Architecture of Yonaguni Town]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Toyama Shrine]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[沖縄県]][[与那国町]]の建築物に関するカテゴリ。
{{デフォルトソート:よなくにちよう}} {{座標一覧}} ==Local Content== {{citation needed|よなくにちよう}} {{座標一覧}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:与那国町の建築物}} {{translated page|ja|Category:与那国町の建築物|version=92643829}} {{translated page|ja|与那国町の建築物|2=Category:与那国町の建築物|comment=minor fix to get the category to display, cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}}
[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:Category:与那国町の建築物]] [[sn:Category:Architecture of Yonaguni Town]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Toyama Shrine]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]]
[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Buildings in Okinawa Prefecture by Municipality]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Yonaguni, Okinawa]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Categories]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q138001265)
Text replacement - "ategories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Cqq]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Cqq but with jawiki]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{デフォルトソート:よなくにちよう}}
{{座標一覧}}
{{citation needed|よなくにちよう}}
{{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:与那国町の建築物}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:与那国町の建築物|version=92643829}}
{{translated page|ja|与那国町の建築物|2=Category:与那国町の建築物|comment=minor fix to get the category to display, cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}}
{{wikidata link|Q138001265}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[ja:Category:与那国町の建築物]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:sn_crud|TESTCategory:Architecture of Yonaguni Town]]
[[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Toyama Shrine]]
[[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]
[[Category:Buildings in Okinawa Prefecture by Municipality]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]
[[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]]
[[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]
[[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]]
[[Category:Yonaguni, Okinawa]]
